Sunset Creek Interconnect Capacity for April 20 - 27, 2026


Notice Text:

As per notice #175878, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow at Sunset Creek Interconnect:

Sunset Creek Interconnect Capacity

April 20 - 27, 2026: 0 GJ

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
